ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., MID, GLK) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the player */,
  "points_last_round" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the last round */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points scored by the player per round */,
  "average_points_per_dollar" REAL /* Average points scored by the player per dollar */,
  "total_points_per_dollar" REAL /* Total points scored by the player per dollar */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "form" REAL /* Current form of the player */,
  "last_five_matches_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the last five matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code for the team (e.g., WAT, STK) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the fixture */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the fixture */,
  "fixture_date" TEXT /* Date of the fixture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fixture */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the fixture */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the fixture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_fixtures" (
  "player_fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player fixture */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing the fixture */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the fixture */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the fixture */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the fixture */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player in the fixture */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player in the fixture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_fixtures_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_fixtures_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fantasy team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the fantasy team was last updated */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Current budget of the fantasy team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_team_players" (
  "fantasy_team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team player */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the team */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player was acquired */,
  "cost_at_acquisition" INTEGER /* Cost of the player at acquisition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player in the team (e.g., 'active', 'bench') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_players_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("fantasy_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., 'admin', 'user') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
